name_cn:
❤️ M44871
PALM SPRINGS Small Shoulder Bag
Crafted from Monogram Reverse canvas, this shoulder bag is a personalized accessory for the urban trendsetter, complementing a vibrant on-the-go look. Lightweight, comfortable, and practical, the relaxed construction offers ample space.
Detailed Features
22 x 29 x 10 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Nylon lining
Soft calfskin
Gold-tone metal hardware
Adjustable, padded leather shoulder strap
Double-zipper closure
Front zip pocket
Handle: Single handle
